name: Academy Metals Inc.
summary: Academy Metals Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of exploration and evaluation assets in Canada. It holds interest in the Margurete Gold Project that covers an area of 678 hectares; Hewitt Point Project, which covers an area of 530 hectares; Enid Project that covers an area of 739 hectares; and Loughborough Claims, which comprise 739 hectares of mineral claims located in the Phillips Arm gold camp, Vancouver Mining Division. The company was formerly known as Unity Metals Corp. and changed its name to Academy Metals Inc. in August 2019. Academy Metals Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
